title: Wipro and Bajaj Auto announce share buybacks: Why are companies doing it now and what changed in Budget 2026?

title: Sebi eases onboarding norms for foreign portfolio investors
summary: The Securities and Exchange Board of India has simplified rules for foreign investors. This eases the process of obtaining PAN cards for overseas portfolio investors. title: Fuel hike not enough to offset all losses, oil stocks fall further
